message:
test(proptest): add regression seed for RetryPolicy property test

New shrunk regression case for proptest_retry: captures a RetryPolicy with
initial_delay=1ms, max_delay=1s, backoff_factor≈1.102, jitter_percent=0.0,
max_attempts=Some(10) that triggered a failure during property testing.

Checking this seed into source control ensures all developers and CI benefit
from the minimized reproducer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,3 +5,4 @@
 # It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
 # everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
 cc 68ceba9b570490debb39d584cf3d3f9fa0313d4fd98ef4ae354798af4472edff # shrinks to init_ms = 813, factor = 2.5418998128760157, attempt = 9
+cc 80ad187e2c03315fbedeb3780815dcc6e247b27aab7fdd1532fa83ffe4af35c3 # shrinks to policy = RetryPolicy { initial_delay: 1ms, max_delay: 1s, backoff_factor: 1.1020177325141753, jitter_percent: 0.0, max_attempts: Some(10) }
